# Classes
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Classes&prop=wikitext

The game allows the player to choose among 14 different classes, each one with a characteristic ability, a different playstyle and of course a different way to enjoy the game
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Classes</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Rogue.png
| link = Rogue
| text = Rogue
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Archer.png
| link = Archer
| text = Archer
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Wizard.png
| link = Wizard
| text = Wizard
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Priest.png
| link = Priest
| text = Priest
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Warrior.png
| link = Warrior
| text = Warrior
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Knight.png
| link = Knight
| text = Knight
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Paladin.png
| link = Paladin
| text = Paladin
}}
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Assassin.png
| link = Assassin
| text = Assassin
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Necromancer.png
| link = Necromancer
| text = Necromancer
| widthT = 85px;
| offset = 6px;
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Huntress.png
| link = Huntress
| text = Huntress
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Mystic.png
| link = Mystic
| text = Mystic
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Trickster.png
| link = Trickster
| text = Trickster
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Sorcerer.png
| link = Sorcerer
| text = Sorcerer
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = Ninja.png
| link = Ninja
| text = Ninja
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
